violations.text: The door to the outside, located at the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The 3-bay sink is lacking stoppers. Stoppers must be obtained prior to opening. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
